03 Mar 2026

MCMC Statement on Spectrum Allocation 2026

The Malaysian Communications and Multimedia Commission (MCMC) wishes to announce the updated spectrum allocation framework for 2026.

This framework covers the following frequency bands:

  • 700 MHz band for rural broadband
  • 2600 MHz band for urban 5G deployment
  • 3500 MHz band for 5G services

For the full report, please download the PDF below:

Spectrum Allocation Framework 2026 (PDF)

Further enquiries may be directed to:

Annex A – Spectrum Details
